raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX id : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ( XXXX hours ago ) My name is XXXX XXXX XXXX age XXXX with an XXXX credit score and I am appealing the Citibank decision to charge me for the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX purchase on XX/XX/year>. I notified Citibank immediately upon learning a charge was made using my card the next day on XX/XX/year>, telling them that I hadn't ordered it and that the charge was fraudulent. 

I explained and provided my proof of purchase from XXXX XXXX using my card XXXX XXXX XXXX for my purchase of XXXX on XX/XX/year> more than a month before the charge on the XX/XX/year> date in question. 

The Citibank XXXX card has been locked by me so no other fraud charges can occur while this is being handled. I notified Citibank and XXXX immediately that it was fraud and they are still saying I have to pay XXXX. The only way I can prove my innocence according to Citibank is to show proof of purchase using another credit card to make the XXXX purchase, which I did for the XX/XX/XXXX purchase of the XXXX which was mailed to me, but I can not provide proof of purchase as requested by Citibank for the XX/XX/XXXX charge of XXXX since that transaction was made by an unknown fraudulent person. 

The only place I used the card was at XXXX during XXXX, XXXX, and to pay for the XXXX install on XX/XX/XXXX at Best Buy in XXXX NC, not at XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/year>. 

Will you please help me correct this fraudulent use of my credit card? 



XXXX XXXX XXXX
